_comment: Auto-generated in-character comments on Field Report articles. Keyed by article slug. Each comment is by another staff member (not the article author), in their voice, max 220 chars, capped 3 per article.

the-case-for-functional-girth.text: Structurally sound. "Decorative girth" vs "functional girth" is a distinction the catalogue, properly understood, has needed since volume one. I remain skeptical of the specific entries, pending review.
Bertram made this exact point to Philippe Marchand at the '94 Geneva salon, standing next to a Bugatti EB110. Nobody listened. Eli, darling, you've essentially reinvented him. I'm not upset.
